nodes.label: MIDI In
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI events (passed through; captured only during recording)

nodes.label: Playing?
nodes.description: Checks if playState is Play or Record and a sequence is selected

nodes.label: Tick Range Calculation
nodes.description: Calculates tick range for this audio block: positionInTicks to positionInTicks + (numSamples * ticksPerSample * playbackSpeed)

nodes.label: Event Fetch Loop
nodes.description: Calls seq->getNextEvent(currentRange) in a while loop to retrieve all MIDI events within the tick range (max 16 per block)

nodes.label: Loop Wrap?
nodes.description: Inside getNextEvent(): detects if tick range crosses loopEnd, splits into before-wrap and after-wrap sub-ranges

nodes.label: Event Conversion
nodes.description: Converts MidiMessage to HiseEvent with sample-accurate timestamp, marks as artificial, sets channel to currentTrack+1

nodes.label: CC Routing
nodes.description: CC events: optionally consumed by global MIDI automation handler, otherwise added to buffer. Sustain pedal (CC64) tracked.

nodes.label: NoteOn Injection
nodes.description: NoteOn added to buffer via pushArtificialNoteOn + addEvent. Matching noteOff fetched and either added to buffer or deferred to next block.

nodes.label: Position Advance
nodes.description: currentPosition += delta; ticksSincePlaybackStart += tickThisTime

nodes.label: Past Loop End?
nodes.description: If position > loopEnd: when looping, wraps back to loopStart; when one-shot, stops playback

nodes.label: Record Capture
nodes.description: In processHiseEvent(): captures incoming non-artificial MIDI events with tick timestamps during Record state

nodes.label: Overdub Flush
nodes.description: OverdubUpdater timer periodically flushes accumulated note pairs into the sequence via flushEdit()

nodes.label: MIDI Out (Buffer)
nodes.description: HiseEventBuffer with injected artificial events from sequence playback

nodes.label: CurrentPosition
nodes.description: Normalized playback position 0-1, read-write (seek), non-persistent

nodes.label: CurrentSequence
nodes.description: 1-based sequence index (0 = no sequence selected)

nodes.label: CurrentTrack
nodes.description: 1-based track index within multi-track MIDI file, affects both playback and editing

nodes.label: LoopEnabled
nodes.description: Toggle: loop (wraps at boundaries) vs one-shot (stops at LoopEnd)

nodes.label: LoopStart
nodes.description: Normalized loop start position; used as wrap target when looping; no effect in one-shot mode

nodes.label: LoopEnd
nodes.description: Normalized loop end position; acts as playback endpoint in both loop and one-shot modes

nodes.label: PlaybackSpeed
nodes.description: Speed multiplier on top of host-tempo-synced playback (1.0 = host tempo)

nodes.label: Host Tempo (BPM)
nodes.description: Host BPM via TempoListener callback; determines ticksPerSample base rate

nodes.label: Transport API
nodes.description: play() / stop() / record() called from scripting API or master clock sync

nodes.label: MIDI File Pool
nodes.description: HISE pool system providing MIDI file data via loadMidiFile()
